subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Thy detailed letter was perused, and from its meanings was drawn attraction to the lights of the Beauty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه مفصل شما ملاحظه گردید و از معانی آن انجذاب بانوار جمال
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @firmness in the Covenant, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant
